prompt: Run Stage 3 task synthesis on SSO SAML feature. Stage 2 analysis is complete — all analyses were SUFFICIENT. Synthesize findings and prepare agreement package for user review.

assertions.text: analysis.md created with all required sections (Task Goal, Problem Statement, Key Scenarios, System Scope, Constraints, Risks, Candidate Solution Directions)
agreement-package.md created with all 5 blocks (Goal & Problem Understanding, Scope, Key Scenarios, Constraints, Candidate Solution Directions)
Synthesis critic was spawned and returned a verdict
analysis.md resolves or flags contradictions from Stage 2 analyses (e.g., password fallback policy, account linking strategy)
agreement-package.md blocks end with confirmation questions for the user
analysis.md preserves key findings: zero test coverage, single Keycloak realm, direct grant to auth code shift, no per-tenant config storage
Candidate solution directions include options (e.g., minimal MVO vs. systematic approach)
Open questions from Stage 2 are carried forward (password fallback, account linking, per-tenant config design)
